framework.name: NHS Data Security and Protection Toolkit
framework.name_nl: NHS Data Security and Protection Toolkit
framework.issuing_body: NHS Digital / Department of Health and Social Care (DHSC)
framework.scope: Data security standards for all organisations that access NHS patient data and systems. Based on the National Data Guardian 10 data security standards.
framework.structure_description: 10 data security standards from the National Data Guardian review, each with multiple assertions that organisations must evidence

controls.title: Personal Confidential Data
controls.description: All staff ensure that personal confidential data is handled, stored and transmitted securely, whether in electronic or paper form. Personal confidential data is only shared for lawful and appropriate purposes.
controls.description_nl: All staff ensure that personal confidential data is handled, stored and transmitted securely, whether in electronic or paper form. Personal confidential data is only shared for lawful and appropriate purposes.
controls.implementation_guidance: Ensure all staff understand their responsibilities for handling personal confidential data. Implement technical and organisational measures to protect data. Define sharing agreements.
controls.verification_guidance: Review data handling policies. Audit compliance with data sharing agreements.

controls.title: Data handling policy
controls.description: There is a data protection and handling policy in place that is disseminated to all staff.
controls.description_nl: There is a data protection and handling policy in place that is disseminated to all staff.
controls.implementation_guidance: Create a data protection and handling policy covering collection, storage, use, sharing, and disposal. Ensure all staff receive and acknowledge the policy.
controls.verification_guidance: Verify policy exists and is current. Check staff acknowledgement records.

controls.title: Confidentiality agreements
controls.description: All staff who handle personal confidential data have signed confidentiality agreements or have equivalent contractual obligations in place.
controls.description_nl: All staff who handle personal confidential data have signed confidentiality agreements or have equivalent contractual obligations in place.
controls.implementation_guidance: Include confidentiality clauses in employment contracts. Require signed confidentiality agreements from temporary staff and contractors.
controls.verification_guidance: Verify all staff have signed agreements. Check contractor compliance.

controls.title: Data sharing agreements
controls.description: There are approved data sharing agreements in place wherever personal confidential data is shared with other organisations.
controls.description_nl: There are approved data sharing agreements in place wherever personal confidential data is shared with other organisations.
controls.implementation_guidance: Maintain a register of data sharing agreements. Ensure agreements define lawful basis, data items, security measures, and retention. Review agreements annually.
controls.verification_guidance: Review data sharing agreement register. Verify agreements are current and approved.

controls.title: Personal confidential data flows mapped
controls.description: Data flows involving personal confidential data are identified, mapped, and documented.
controls.description_nl: Data flows involving personal confidential data are identified, mapped, and documented.
controls.implementation_guidance: Map all data flows involving personal confidential data. Document source, destination, transfer method, and security controls. Update when systems change.
controls.verification_guidance: Review data flow maps. Verify maps are current and complete.

controls.title: Staff Responsibilities
controls.description: All staff understand their responsibilities under the National Data Guardian data security standards, including their obligation to handle data responsibly and report data breaches.
controls.description_nl: All staff understand their responsibilities under the National Data Guardian data security standards, including their obligation to handle data responsibly and report data breaches.
controls.implementation_guidance: Define and communicate data security responsibilities for all staff. Include data security in job descriptions and performance reviews.
controls.verification_guidance: Review job descriptions for security responsibilities. Check staff understand their obligations.

controls.title: Clear responsibilities defined
controls.description: All staff with access to personal confidential data have clear responsibilities for data security defined in their contracts or job descriptions.
controls.description_nl: All staff with access to personal confidential data have clear responsibilities for data security defined in their contracts or job descriptions.
controls.implementation_guidance: Include data security responsibilities in contracts and job descriptions. Define roles such as Caldicott Guardian and SIRO.
controls.verification_guidance: Review contracts and job descriptions. Verify named roles are assigned.

controls.title: Caldicott Guardian appointed
controls.description: A Caldicott Guardian has been appointed at senior level to oversee arrangements for the use and sharing of patient information.
controls.description_nl: A Caldicott Guardian has been appointed at senior level to oversee arrangements for the use and sharing of patient information.
controls.implementation_guidance: Appoint a Caldicott Guardian at board or senior management level. Ensure they are registered on the NHS Caldicott Guardian register.
controls.verification_guidance: Confirm Caldicott Guardian appointment and registration.

controls.title: Training
controls.description: All staff complete appropriate annual data security training and pass a mandatory test. Training content addresses the handling of personal confidential data and cyber security awareness.
controls.description_nl: All staff complete appropriate annual data security training and pass a mandatory test. Training content addresses the handling of personal confidential data and cyber security awareness.
controls.implementation_guidance: Deliver annual mandatory data security awareness training to all staff. Include a test that staff must pass. Track completion rates and target 95% compliance.
controls.verification_guidance: Review training completion statistics. Verify target compliance rate is met.

controls.title: Annual data security training
controls.description: At least 95% of all staff have completed annual data security awareness training within the reporting period.
controls.description_nl: At least 95% of all staff have completed annual data security awareness training within the reporting period.
controls.implementation_guidance: Use the NHS Data Security Awareness e-learning or equivalent approved training. Monitor completion rates monthly. Follow up with non-compliant staff.
controls.verification_guidance: Check training completion records against 95% target.

controls.title: Managing Data Access
controls.description: Personal confidential data is only accessible to staff who need it for their current role and access is removed when no longer required. All access to personal confidential data on IT systems is logged and audited.
controls.description_nl: Personal confidential data is only accessible to staff who need it for their current role and access is removed when no longer required. All access to personal confidential data on IT systems is logged and audited.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implement role-based access control. Conduct regular access reviews. Remove access promptly for leavers. Log access to personal confidential data.
controls.verification_guidance: Review access control policies and recent access reviews. Check leaver access revocation process.

controls.title: Role-based access control
controls.description: Access to personal confidential data is restricted based on role, following the principle of least privilege.
controls.description_nl: Access to personal confidential data is restricted based on role, following the principle of least privilege.
controls.implementation_guidance: Define access profiles for each role. Implement role-based access control in systems. Review access profiles when roles change.
controls.verification_guidance: Verify role-based access control is implemented. Review access profiles.

controls.title: Access audit logging
controls.description: All access to personal confidential data held on electronic systems is logged. Audit logs are reviewed regularly and proactively to detect inappropriate access.
controls.description_nl: All access to personal confidential data held on electronic systems is logged. Audit logs are reviewed regularly and proactively to detect inappropriate access.
controls.implementation_guidance: Enable audit logging on all systems holding personal confidential data. Review logs for inappropriate access patterns. Investigate anomalies.
controls.verification_guidance: Verify audit logging is enabled. Review recent audit log analysis reports.

controls.title: Leaver access revocation
controls.description: A process is in place to remove IT access from staff who leave the organisation or change roles within agreed timescales.
controls.description_nl: A process is in place to remove IT access from staff who leave the organisation or change roles within agreed timescales.
controls.implementation_guidance: Integrate HR and IT processes to revoke access on the day of departure. Conduct regular checks for orphaned accounts.
controls.verification_guidance: Check process for timely access revocation. Audit for orphaned accounts.

controls.title: Process Reviews
controls.description: Processes are reviewed at least annually to identify and improve processes which have caused breaches or near misses, or which force staff to use workarounds which compromise data security.
controls.description_nl: Processes are reviewed at least annually to identify and improve processes which have caused breaches or near misses, or which force staff to use workarounds which compromise data security.
controls.implementation_guidance: Review data handling processes annually. Identify processes that have caused breaches or near misses. Improve processes to reduce workarounds.
controls.verification_guidance: Review process improvement records. Verify annual review has been conducted.

controls.title: Annual process review
controls.description: Data handling processes are reviewed at least annually and improvements made based on incidents, near misses, and staff feedback.
controls.description_nl: Data handling processes are reviewed at least annually and improvements made based on incidents, near misses, and staff feedback.
controls.implementation_guidance: Conduct annual review of all data handling processes. Gather feedback from staff. Prioritise improvements based on risk.
controls.verification_guidance: Review process review records. Verify improvements have been implemented.

controls.title: Responding to Incidents
controls.description: Cyber attacks against services are identified and resisted and CareCERT advisories are responded to. Action is taken immediately following a data breach or a near miss, with a report made to senior management.
controls.description_nl: Cyber attacks against services are identified and resisted and CareCERT advisories are responded to. Action is taken immediately following a data breach or a near miss, with a report made to senior management.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implement incident response procedures. Subscribe to and act on CareCERT advisories. Report incidents to the ICO within 72 hours where required. Notify affected individuals.
controls.verification_guidance: Review incident response procedures. Check CareCERT advisory response records.

controls.title: Incident reporting process
controls.description: There is a documented process for reporting and managing data security incidents, including notification to the ICO and NHS Digital where required.
controls.description_nl: There is a documented process for reporting and managing data security incidents, including notification to the ICO and NHS Digital where required.
controls.implementation_guidance: Document incident reporting procedures. Include ICO notification triggers and timelines. Train staff on incident reporting.
controls.verification_guidance: Review incident reporting procedures. Verify staff know how to report incidents.

controls.title: CareCERT advisory response
controls.description: CareCERT advisories are received, assessed, and acted upon in a timely manner.
controls.description_nl: CareCERT advisories are received, assessed, and acted upon in a timely manner.
controls.implementation_guidance: Subscribe to CareCERT alerts. Define a process for assessing and responding to advisories. Track response actions.
controls.verification_guidance: Check CareCERT subscription status. Review advisory response records.

controls.title: Continuity Planning
controls.description: A tested plan is in place to respond to threats to data security, including significant data breaches or security incidents, and to ensure the continuity of critical services.
controls.description_nl: A tested plan is in place to respond to threats to data security, including significant data breaches or security incidents, and to ensure the continuity of critical services.
controls.implementation_guidance: Develop business continuity plans covering data security scenarios. Test plans regularly. Include cyber incident scenarios in testing.
controls.verification_guidance: Review business continuity plans. Check test records and improvement actions.

controls.title: Business continuity plan tested
controls.description: The business continuity plan has been tested within the last 12 months, including scenarios involving data security incidents.
controls.description_nl: The business continuity plan has been tested within the last 12 months, including scenarios involving data security incidents.
controls.implementation_guidance: Test business continuity plans at least annually. Include data security incident scenarios. Document results and lessons learned.
controls.verification_guidance: Review test records. Verify tests include data security scenarios.

controls.title: Unsupported Systems
controls.description: No unsupported operating systems, software, or internet browsers are used within the IT estate.
controls.description_nl: No unsupported operating systems, software, or internet browsers are used within the IT estate.
controls.implementation_guidance: Maintain a software inventory. Identify end-of-life software. Plan migration or replacement before support ends. Where unsupported systems must continue, apply compensating controls.
controls.verification_guidance: Audit for unsupported software. Review migration plans for approaching end-of-life systems.

controls.title: Software inventory maintained
controls.description: An inventory of all software in use is maintained, including operating systems, applications, and browser versions.
controls.description_nl: An inventory of all software in use is maintained, including operating systems, applications, and browser versions.
controls.implementation_guidance: Use automated tools to discover and inventory software. Flag unsupported versions. Report to senior management.
controls.verification_guidance: Review software inventory. Check for unsupported items.

controls.title: IT Protection
controls.description: A strategy is in place for protecting IT systems from cyber threats which is based on a proven cyber security framework such as Cyber Essentials. This is reviewed at least annually.
controls.description_nl: A strategy is in place for protecting IT systems from cyber threats which is based on a proven cyber security framework such as Cyber Essentials. This is reviewed at least annually.
controls.implementation_guidance: Adopt a recognised cyber security framework (e.g., Cyber Essentials). Implement the framework controls. Review the strategy annually.
controls.verification_guidance: Verify a cyber security framework is adopted. Review annual strategy review records.

controls.title: Firewall protection
controls.description: Firewalls are in place at the network perimeter and configured to restrict inbound and outbound traffic to that which is necessary for business purposes.
controls.description_nl: Firewalls are in place at the network perimeter and configured to restrict inbound and outbound traffic to that which is necessary for business purposes.
controls.implementation_guidance: Deploy and configure boundary firewalls. Implement default-deny rules. Document and review firewall rules regularly.
controls.verification_guidance: Review firewall configurations and rule sets.

controls.title: Anti-malware protection
controls.description: Anti-malware protection is installed and running on all devices that connect to the network. Signatures are kept up to date.
controls.description_nl: Anti-malware protection is installed and running on all devices that connect to the network. Signatures are kept up to date.
controls.implementation_guidance: Deploy anti-malware to all endpoints. Enable automatic updates. Monitor anti-malware status centrally.
controls.verification_guidance: Verify anti-malware deployment and update status.

controls.title: Network encryption
controls.description: Encryption is used for data in transit and at rest where appropriate. Wireless networks use WPA2 or better.
controls.description_nl: Encryption is used for data in transit and at rest where appropriate. Wireless networks use WPA2 or better.
controls.implementation_guidance: Enable TLS for all web services. Encrypt data at rest on laptops and removable media. Use WPA2 Enterprise or WPA3 for wireless networks.
controls.verification_guidance: Test encryption on network services. Verify wireless security configuration.

controls.title: Accountable Suppliers
controls.description: IT suppliers are held accountable via contracts for protecting the personal confidential data they process and meeting the National Data Guardian data security standards.
controls.description_nl: IT suppliers are held accountable via contracts for protecting the personal confidential data they process and meeting the National Data Guardian data security standards.
controls.implementation_guidance: Include data security requirements in all IT contracts. Require suppliers to complete the DSPT. Monitor supplier compliance.
controls.verification_guidance: Review IT contracts for data security clauses. Check supplier DSPT status.

controls.title: Supplier contracts include data security
controls.description: All contracts with IT suppliers who process personal confidential data include data security requirements aligned with the National Data Guardian standards.
controls.description_nl: All contracts with IT suppliers who process personal confidential data include data security requirements aligned with the National Data Guardian standards.
controls.implementation_guidance: Include standard data security clauses in procurement templates. Require DSPT compliance from suppliers. Include right-to-audit provisions.
controls.verification_guidance: Review procurement templates and active contracts.

controls.title: Supplier DSPT status monitored
controls.description: The DSPT status of IT suppliers who process personal confidential data is checked and monitored.
controls.description_nl: The DSPT status of IT suppliers who process personal confidential data is checked and monitored.
controls.implementation_guidance: Maintain a register of suppliers with their DSPT status. Check supplier DSPT submissions annually. Follow up with suppliers who have not met the standards.
controls.verification_guidance: Review supplier DSPT status register.
